message:
Dear Pharmacy Team,

The following medicine batch is expiring soon:

  • Medicine: {{ doc.medicine_name }}
  • Batch No: {{ doc.batch_no }}
  • Expiry Date: {{ doc.expiry_date }}
  • Days to Expiry: {{ doc.days_to_expiry }}
  • Qty in Stock: {{ doc.qty }}
  • Alert Level: {{ doc.alert_level }}

Please take appropriate action.
name: Expiry Alert Notification
subject: ⚠️ Medicine Expiry Alert: {{ doc.medicine_name }} expires in {{ doc.days_to_expiry }} days
